'''japazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kybosh|kybosh]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kybosh|kybosh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| japazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæpæzhæth|jæpæzhæth]] || [[word:jæpæzhæj|jæpæzhæj]] || [[word:jæpæzhæsh|jæpæzhæsh]] || [[word:jæpæzhæ|jæpæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:japapazhath|japapazhath]] || [[word:japapazhaj|japapazhaj]] || [[word:japapazhash|japapazhash]] || [[word:japapazha|japapazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:japazhath|japazhath]] || [[word:japazhaj|japazhaj]] || [[word:japazhash|japazhash]] || [[word:japazha|japazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:japafzhath|japafzhath]] || [[word:japafzhaj|japafzhaj]] || [[word:japafzhash|japafzhash]] || [[word:japafzhaf|japafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:japazhatha|japazhatha]] || [[word:japazhaja|japazhaja]] || [[word:japazhasha|japazhasha]] || [[word:japazhaka|japazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:japazhath|japazhath]] || [[word:japazhaj|japazhaj]] || [[word:japazhash|japazhash]] || [[word:japazha|japazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:japazhathal|japazhathal]] || [[word:japazhajal|japazhajal]] || [[word:japazhashal|japazhashal]] || [[word:japazhakal|japazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:japazhathatha|japazhathatha]] || [[word:japazhajaja|japazhajaja]] || [[word:japazhashasha|japazhashasha]] || [[word:japazhaka|japazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:japazhathan|japazhathan]] || [[word:japazhajan|japazhajan]] || [[word:japazhashan|japazhashan]] || [[word:japazhakan|japazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:japazhathaoro|japazhathaoro]] || [[word:japazhajaoro|japazhajaoro]] || [[word:japazhashaoro|japazhashaoro]] || [[word:japazhakaoro|japazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
